# Kanhaiya Lal Suthar

Maths Teacher, Web Developer, and Tech Enthusiast from Dhadheru, Churu, Rajasthan, India. Specializes in secondary and primary level mathematics instruction and modern front-end web development.

## Summary

Kanhaiya Lal Suthar holds a B.Sc.-B.Ed. integrated degree with first distinction. He has over 6 years of computer experience, combining mathematical teaching methodologies with modern technology. He builds responsive web applications and SaaS platforms, utilizing AI prompt engineering, React, Next.js, and vanilla HTML/CSS/JS.

## Skills

### Teaching
- **Mathematics Instruction**: Primary & Senior level pedagogy, simplifying complex algebra, geometry, and arithmetic.
- **Engagement**: Interactive teaching techniques and student performance tracking.

### Web Development & Computer Skills
- **Frontend Technologies**: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+), React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS.
- **Tools & Productivity**: MS Office (Advanced Excel, Word), AI Prompt Engineering, Web Design.
- **Core Strengths**: Responsive web layouts, user interface (UI) transitions, clean code architecture.

- **Institution**: Shri Jagdamba Shikshan Sansthan, Dhadheru, Churu, Rajasthan
- **Duration**: July 2025 - Present
- **Responsibilities**: Teaching fundamental mathematical concepts to primary level students.

- **Institution**: Gov. Sen. Sec. School, Dhadheru, Churu, Rajasthan

- **Responsibilities**: Senior-level mathematics curriculum delivery and student coaching.

- **Institution**: Gov. Sec. School, Dhadheru, Churu, Rajasthan
- **Duration**: 2023 (1+ Month)
- **Responsibilities**: Delivered science lessons and supervised practical lab experiments.

## Projects

### VidyaFrame
- **Role**: Creator & Developer
- **Type**: Commercial SaaS Platform
- **URL**: [https://www.vidyaframe.com/](https://www.vidyaframe.com/)
- **Description**: An educational design tool helping schools and teachers generate custom-branded worksheets, certificates, posters, and charts with a single click. Built with Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, and a PDF rendering engine.

### EdMusing Shield
- **Role**: Creator & Developer
- **URL**: [https://edmusingshield.com/](https://edmusingshield.com/)
- **Description**: An interactive online education portal featuring responsive layouts and modern design concepts, aiming to facilitate smoother digital learning for students.

### Student Progress Dashboard
- **Role**: Developer
- **URL**: [https://student-progress-dashboard.web.app/](https://student-progress-dashboard.web.app/)
- **Description**: A data visualization dashboard enabling teachers to analyze grades, identify learning trends, and track student growth dynamically.

### Vishwakarma Wood & CNC Work
- **Role**: Developer
- **URL**: [https://vishwakarmafurniture.web.app/](https://vishwakarmafurniture.web.app/)
- **Description**: A responsive digital storefront showcasing custom carpentry, wood carvings, and CNC patterns. Built with premium design layouts and a direct WhatsApp integration.

### KhatiRaj Woodworks
- **Role**: Developer
- **URL**: [https://khatirajwoodwork.web.app/](https://khatirajwoodwork.web.app/)
- **Description**: An e-commerce showcase application displaying luxury furniture craft items, with smooth page navigation and image highlights.
